movie.actors: Lou Diamond Phillips, Lulu Wilson, Janet Kidder, Michael Coleman
movie.genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Crime, Family, Mystery
movie.plot: A precocious kid and a police officer join forces to catch a criminal at large.
movie.title: Cop and a Half: New Recruit
movie.writer: Scott Bindley, Arne Olsen (based on stories and characters by), Arne Olsen (story by), Adrian Vina
